user_query: I want to track my daily workouts and monitor my progress, and get recommendations for fitness tracking apps and devices, as well as healthy recipes and meal plans for my fitness goals.

TaskList.description: Research and list popular fitness tracking apps and devices suitable for daily workout tracking.
Compile user reviews and ratings for the recommended fitness tracking apps and devices from reliable sources.
Gather a list of healthy recipes that align with fitness goals such as muscle gain, weight loss, or stamina building.
Create meal plans incorporating the healthy recipes, ensuring they meet nutritional needs for fitness enthusiasts.
Compile all information into a structured report for the user, including apps, devices, recipes, and meal plans.
